questions.q: According to a May 2026 study, White Americans who regularly get their political news from which network show much higher levels of support for the Great Replacement Theory?
A May 2026 Northwestern University study on paternal mortality data in Georgia found that the majority of deaths among new dads within five years of birth were due to what?
options: Potentially preventable causes like homicide and accidental injury
Genetic heart conditions triggered by stress
Workplace accidents due to sleep deprivation
questions.correctText: Potentially preventable causes like homicide and accidental injury

questions.q: According to a May 2026 national survey, what is the most commonly microdosed substance among adults in the U.S.?
A May 2026 psychology study found that modern German viewers felt less guilt about Holocaust atrocities when images were mixed with smiling photographs of which historical figure?
A May 2026 University of Georgia study found that adults could significantly lower their rate of cognitive decline in just two years by managing what?
